notableEvents.label: Austin Riley plunked
notableEvents.detail: Austin Riley hit by pitch. Michael Harris II to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Seiya Suzuki reaches on a fielder's choice. Ian Happ to 3rd. Ian Happ advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by shortstop Ha-Seong Kim.
